message:
fix: return error from KillStaleSession instead of silently swallowing it (gt-4s25eb)

When a stale session was detected, KillSessionWithProcesses errors were
passed to debugSession which only logs when GT_DEBUG_SESSION is set.
If the kill failed, the code would proceed to create a new session,
resulting in an obscured tmux "duplicate session" error.

Now the error is properly checked and returned to the caller.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
